title: Introducing eve, an open-source agent framework
summary: Introducing eve, an open-source agent framework
whyItMatters: eve is now available in public preview. eve is an open-source framework for building, running, and scaling agents. An agent is just a directory of files, and production comes built in: Durable execution Sandboxed compute Human-in-the-loop approvals Subagents Evals The smallest agent that runs is just two files, a model and a set of instructions. Add a tool,…
